mapper.select: SELECT 'provisionAndMgmtPPE' AS title ,'/ProvisionAndMgmtPPE' AS route ,'provisionAndMgmtPPEDesc' AS description , case when ppeManage.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_ppe_manage tpm WHERE tpm.comp_id = #{compId} AND tpm.write_year = #{searchText} ) as exist ) AS ppeManage union all SELECT 'safetyMgmtOfHazardousMachinery' AS title ,'/SafetyMgmtOfHazardousMachinery' AS route ,'safetyMgmtOfHazardousMachineryDesc' AS description , case when smhm.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_safety_mgmt_of_hazardous_machinery tsmohm WHERE tsmohm.comp_id = #{compId} AND tsmohm.write_year = #{searchText} ) as exist ) AS smhm
